text.text: Welcome to Materials and You, within these pages you will find useful information regarding Tinkers' Antique and its many features. You can also utilize JEI/HEI to see more recipes used for smelting, alloying, casting, and more!
This book is a magic copy. If lost, another one can be called upon this world by combining both a blank pattern and a blank book together.
Some pages regarding recipes are still missing for the time being, you'll have to rely on JEI/HEI or wikis online for further information.
